mapper.select: /** UsptEvlObjcProcessHistDao.selectList */ select fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@LSOPS_CODE_GROUP}', ueoph.slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd) as process_sttus , ueoph.resn_cn , ueoph.created_dt , ci.member_nm , ci.login_id , row_number() over (order by ueoph.created_dt desc) as rn from uspt_evl_objc_process_hist ueoph inner join cmmt_insider ci on ci.member_id = ueoph.creator_id where ueoph.evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id = #{evlSlctnObjcReqstId}

/** UsptEvlObjcProcessHistDao.selectRejectReason */ select distinct on(evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id) evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id , resn_cn as reject_reason_cn , created_dt from uspt_evl_objc_process_hist where evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id = #{evlSlctnObjcReqstId} and slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@LSOPS_02_CODE_GROUP}' order by evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id, created_dt desc
